_meta.purpose: Corrections used in the warm-learning phase. Feed via /api/correct to train ASV. Disjoint from dev and validation sets.

corrections.query: get the money back for that order
I need to cancel their recurring charge
give me a list of who signed up this month
add this new client to stripe
bill this one on a monthly schedule
we owe them money, send it
draw up an invoice for the consulting work
move the balance out of stripe
the buyer wants their money back
the tshirt drop goes live next monday, list it
how many orders did we get today
we're almost out of mediums
box it up and ship it
make a 15 off code for the holiday sale
pull the contact info for this customer
add a new person to the shopify contacts
log a new bug for the UI regression
put emma on this one
what's currently active in the sprint
open a new initiative for mobile rework
leave a note on the ticket about the workaround
flag this as a P0
close out this completed ticket
who's currently on the ios team
ship the latest main to prod
this deploy is busted, revert it
show me what's failing in the latest build
store the new api token as an env var
how much bandwidth did we use this month
attach the new marketing domain
push the preview live to prod
